food_waste.management_method: Place all cooked or uncooked food scraps, peels, and leftovers into the Green Dustbin. 🍎 Do not put plastic bags in this bin.

tissues.management_method: Used tissues and paper towels are compostable. Place them in the Green Dustbin.

paper_straw.management_method: Paper straws can be composted. Place them in the Green Dustbin after use.
